title: Minebox
body:
Welcome to Minebox. We have Technology, Tornados, Tquality of Life, and most importantly, Trains!

> Note: This modpack is intended for a private server, though it is fine to use it without the server.

## notable features

### Technology

With [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), anything is possible! With only a few cogs you won't even have to play the game anymore! Until the game destroys it, that is.

![A handheld potato cannon aimed at a porkchop on the ground.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73eddbba08b5a4abd2eacf61a5c3627ef282b495.png)

### Trains

A couple addons to Create ([Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), [Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles), [Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors), [Train Perspective](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-train-perspective)) give the trains a more complete feel and generally further their use for player transport in particular (though the nether will always be faster).

![A train with three cars (one for the driver, one for storage, and one for the parrot) stopped precariously ahead of flooded tracks, guided by a signal using Steam 'n' Rails' Semaphore.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6f249a8eec7d6a2ec9a1c98486dbe98e3614045.png)

### Tornados

Have you ever wanted the game to throw a tornado and base and just outright _wreck_ the place? How about two?! Or maybe even three! With the [Weather2](https://modrinth.com/mod/weather-storms-tornadoes) mod, who knows how many tornados you'll have in your base. Just remember to make extra doors.

![Tornados wrecking some trees and the train from earlier. (poor parrot)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05c53fab3a25df988ec3db4bef4ae9c77baea5cf.png)

### Quality of Life mods

We added some mods (like Xaero's [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), various Curios mods to add more slots, [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), and more!) for QoL.

### Resource packs

The primary resource pack in use is [Vanilla Experience+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-exp), along with [Eclectic Trove (Legendary Tooltips)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips) and [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd).
